The ECB backing Key, McCullum and Stokes no matter what is starting to look less like stability and more like zero accountability.
When results dip or decisions raise questions, there’s no scrutiny, no probing questions just unwavering support. A half decent world cup run should not covet up for the awful Ashes.

Strong teams need both backing and accountability. Right now, one seems to be missing.

The more I see and watch of this #RCB management team, the more I am impressed #IPL 
Mo is a real leader, setting the vision, mission and roadmap for the team.
Andy is a big thinker, he has clear ideas that he sets out
Freddie not only translates those ideas and visions into tangible plans, he can also elevate away from the data to see the big picture.
DK and Malo bring the deep local player knowledge and round the team off perfectly.
A perfectly formed team is something stronger than it’s component parts. Many other teams can learn from this.
